tagline: Shop only what you can actually use.

designSystem.style: Dark-first mobile app with vibrant teal/indigo accent palette, glassmorphic card surfaces, pill badges, progress bars, and gradient CTAs. Clean information hierarchy with subtle border treatments and micro-interactions.

screens: Home — Dashboard with active briefs, savings stats, upcoming events strip, and a gradient New Brief CTA
Brief Builder — 3-step guided flow: scenario picker → refinement form → AI-generated smart brief with ranked item recommendations and save/borrow/rent/wait badges
My Lists — Browsable shopping lists per scenario with checkable items, fit-for-purpose scores, durability/frequency metadata, and action badges
Insights — Savings trends chart, category breakdown bars, past-mistake tracker, smart behavioral tips, and light/dark theme toggle
